---
id: adjust-date
title: "Adjust date to business day"
description: "Rolls a date to the nearest business day per the given convention."

hide_title: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Adjust date to business day"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/calendars/adjust"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Rolls a date to the nearest business day per the given convention.

  as={"h2"}
